# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    index = 1
    adj_matrix = []
    
    for _ in range(N):
        row = list(map(int, data[index:index+N]))
        adj_matrix.append(row)
        index += N
    
    for i in range(N):
        neighbors = [j + 1 for j in range(N) if adj_matrix[i][j] == 1]
        print(' '.join(map(str, neighbors)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
